title: S3 Storage Upload Pipeline
description: Initialization, file upload (buffer & streaming multipart), and object copy (simple & multipart) operations in S3StorageController
dependencies: chunk_stream (core.util.streamutil) — splits Readable stream into fixed-size byte arrays
simple_retry (core.util.retryutil) — wraps async calls with N retries + delay
EWMA (core.util.opmath) — exponentially weighted moving average for part-upload timing
TeePromise (teepromise) — resolvable promise used as a backpressure gate
AWS SDK commands: PutObject, CreateMultipartUpload, UploadPart, CompleteMultipartUpload, AbortMultipartUpload, CopyObject, UploadPartCopy, DeleteObject, GetObject

steps: Create this.global_average_S3_part_time = new EWMA({ initial: 4000ms, alpha: 0.1 })

upload.signature: async upload({ uid, file, storage_meta, storage_api })
steps: simple_retry(PutObjectCommand({ Bucket, Key:uid, Body:file.buffer }), retries=3, delay=200ms)
simple_retry(#upload_stream({ bucket_region, bucket, key:uid, stream:file.stream, on_progress }), retries=3, delay=200ms)

upload_stream_private.signature: async #upload_stream({ bucket_region, bucket, key, stream, on_progress })
upload_stream_private.note: Internal multipart streaming upload; called by upload() for stream-based files
steps: Send CreateMultipartUploadCommand({ Bucket, Key }) → get UploadId
[LOOP] for await each chunk from chunk_iterator:
[YES] create TeePromise tp; await tp  ← backpressure gate
simple_retry(UploadPartCommand({ Bucket, Key, PartNumber, UploadId, Body:part }), retries=3, delay=50ms)
Record elapsed time; update global_average_S3_part_time via EWMA.put(elapsed_per_part_size)
uploaded_bytes += part.length; call on_progress({ uploaded: uploaded_bytes })
If TeePromise pending: resolve it (unblocks backpressure gate)
[YES] await queue_empty_promise (TeePromise resolved when queue drains)
Send CompleteMultipartUploadCommand({ Bucket, Key, UploadId, Parts:[{PartNumber, ETag}] })

inputs: src_node (node with s3:location and size getters)
steps: call #copy_simple({ src_key, src_bucket, dst_key, dst_bucket_region, dst_bucket })
call #copy_multipart({ src_key, src_bucket, dst_key, dst_bucket_region, dst_bucket, size, on_progress })

copy_simple_private.signature: async #copy_simple({ dst_bucket_region, dst_bucket, src_bucket, src_key, dst_key })

copy_multipart_private.signature: async #copy_multipart({ dst_bucket_region, dst_bucket, src_bucket, src_key, dst_key, on_progress, size })
steps: Send CreateMultipartUploadCommand({ Bucket:dst_bucket, Key:dst_key }) → get UploadId
[LOOP] byte_start from 0 to size, step part_size:
simple_retry(UploadPartCopyCommand({ Bucket, Key, PartNumber, UploadId, CopySource, CopySourceRange:'bytes=start-end' }), retries=3, delay=50ms)
Push result; call on_progress({ uploaded: byte_end + 1 })
Send CompleteMultipartUploadCommand({ Bucket, Key, UploadId, Parts:[{PartNumber, ETag:CopyPartResult.ETag}] })

key_decisions: upload: file.buffer present → PutObject (single request) vs. stream → multipart upload
upload_stream: concurrent part limit of 4 enforced via TeePromise backpressure gate
upload_stream: empty file handled separately with a single empty-body UploadPart
copy: file size < ~4 GB → CopyObject (single request) vs. ≥ 4 GB → multipart copy with 4 GiB parts
progress_tracking: progress_tracker.set_total(size) + progress_tracker.set(bytesUploaded) called after each buffer upload, each multipart part, and each copy part
error_handling: Buffer upload: simple_retry exhausted → throw s3_error
Stream upload: AbortMultipartUploadCommand sent on any error, then re-throw
Copy parts: throw err immediately if retry exhausted (no explicit abort)
